converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Diva Sanjur papers
Sanjur, Diva.
29-2-3252
3.1 cubic feet. 3.1 cubic feet.
1967-2002. Correspondence, publications, academic materials. Includes course material, correspondence, publications and proposals, relating to Diva Sanjur's career in the Division of Nutritional Sciences. Collection material in English 4584633
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Carolyn Smith
Date completed:
April 2003
EAD encoding:
Carolyn Smith, April 2003Peter Martinez, May 2003
Date modified:
RMC Staff, February 2015
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Emeritus professor in the Division of Nutritional Sciences.
Diva Sanjur received a B.S. in 1958 from the University of Puerto Rico. She earned a M.P.H. degree from the University of California-Berkeley in 1962 and a Ph.D. in nutrition at Cornell in 1968. Between periods of graduate study, she worked as a nutritionist in the Department of Health in Panama. Sanjur joined the Cornell faculty in 1968 and remained a member of the faculty until her retirement in December 1999. She also held appointments as an ad hoc professor at the University of Puerto Rico and at the Research Center for Food and Development in Hermosillo, Mexico.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes course material, correspondence, publications and proposals, relating to Diva Sanjur's career in the Division of Nutritional Sciences and her research on cultural factors in the Hispanic community that affect dietary preferences and the socio-economic variables associated with infection with intestinal parasites.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Course Materials
Box 1- Folders 1-9
A. Nutritional Science Course # 245 Box 1- Folders 10-33
B. Nutritional Science Course # 631 Box 1- Folders 34-60
C. Nutritional Science Course # 325 Box 2- Folders 1-12
Box 2 - Folders 13-23
Series II. Symposiums and International Work
Box 2 - Folders 24-52
Series III. Proposals
Box 2 - Folders 53-60
Series IV. Cornell Programs
Box 3 - Folders 1-3
Series V. Book Material
Box 3 - Folders 4-16
Series VI. Correspondence
Box 3 - Folders 17-30
Series VII. Publications
Box 3 - Folders 31-53 and two binders
Box 4
Cite As:
Diva Sanjur papers. #29-2-3252. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Related Materials
See also collections #23-2-2817, #47-10-3394 and #29-1-3247 for additional biographical information.
Hispanic Americans -- Nutrition. Nutrition -- Diet. Parasites. Nutrition -- Research. Sanjur, Diva. Cornell University -- : Faculty.
